name: faq-split
title: FAQ Split
description: A two-column FAQ pairing a sticky heading with an accordion, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Two-column FAQ with a heading and optional CTA beside the accordion.

sampleContent.title: Questions, answered
sampleContent.description: Billing, security, and onboarding — answered before you have to ask.

items.question: Can I change my plan later?
items.answer: Upgrade or downgrade at any time; changes take effect immediately and we prorate the difference.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: All major credit cards, PayPal, and invoicing for annual enterprise plans.

items.question: How do you handle security?
items.answer: We are SOC 2 Type II certified, encrypt data in transit and at rest, and never train on your data.
